summary: Tested premium redesign of Shop & Homepage Complete Anti-Aging Kit + cart sound + logo single-line + HeroCarousel/feature image overlay removal. Backend smoke (3/3) and frontend (all critical assertions) passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing minor React warning in console: 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority. Did you mean fetchPriority?' — not introduced by this iteration; consider migrating to fetchPriority in JSX to silence the warning.

ShopPage.js renders product 'viewing/sold/left' counts via Math.random on every render (lines 230-232). Numbers will jump on filter clicks/re-render, eroding the 'social proof' illusion. Consider memoizing per-product or computing once in state.
ShopPage uses imports addToCart/addComboToCart from '../pages/Homepage' (cross-page util import). Recommend extracting cart utilities into /utils/cart.js for cleaner architecture.

cartSound.js uses an unconditional new AudioContext() on first call which can be blocked in some browsers without user gesture; current implementation handles ctx.state==='suspended' by calling resume() — looks safe, no console errors observed.
test_credentials: N/A (no auth required for tested flows)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium dark-card Complete Anti-Aging Kit verified on both / and /shop. White heading rgb(255,255,255) confirmed. Hero overlay text/CTA removed. Logo CELESTA(black)+GLOW(emerald) on single line at desktop (both spans same y=19). Shop filters all=5, bestsellers=1, new=2, tbl=4. Cart sound: AudioContext available, no console errors after multiple add-to-cart clicks. Cart badge visually increments (0→1 on homepage, then to 2 on shop). data-testids in use: add-complete-kit, shop-complete-kit-section, shop-add-kit, shop-filter-{all|bestsellers|new|tbl}, shop-product-{slug}, shop-add-{slug}, shop-preorder-{slug}, logo-link-desktop.

homepage.logo_single_line: PASS (CELESTA & GLOW spans both at y=19, no wrap)
